prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CONSTRUCTION-RED-KPL-BUN Product Type: TOY_FIGURE_PLAYSET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Red Fire Truck Toys Carrier with Action Figures Lights Sounds Playset, Ages 3 and Up Description: Sound the alarm, Kidplokio’s Fire Engine Rescue Truck Toy is ready for playtime! Boasting awesome features like lights, sounds and lots of fun fire fighting action figures and accessories to play with, toddlers and young children will be ready to save the day! Watch your child's imagination soar as they embark on heroic missions and learn the importance of helping others.

The firetruck toy lights up and plays realistic rescue sounds with the press of a button, for the ultimate pretend play experience; young kids will love using their imagination while role playing as a firefighter! Play pretend encourages creativity and imagination, while the tactile playtime experience helps children develop their fine motor skills and dexterity, while moving the action figures and vehicles around their play area. Hello screen free playtime!

Designed for at home or on the go play, this fire truck playset comes with a convenient top carry handle, so little ones can bring their toys along with them on play dates, sleepovers, road trips, appointments and more. The fire truck toy is easy to tote and travel with, as the sides of the fire truck snap closed, keeping fire fighter action figures and firefighting accessories safety stowed.

All of the toys and accessories included in this fire truck playset are safe for children ages three and up with adult supervision. And, made from durable materials, this toy truck is designed to withstand all the action. For little guys and gals who love fire trucks and firefighting, this a must have gift from Kidplokio! Search Terms: fire truck; toys for 3 year old boys; pretend play; stem toddler toys; birthday gifts; toy fire truck; toddler playset; hand eye coordination training; tactile sensory toys; toddler fire truck; firefighter gifts Features: - FIRE TRUCK TOYS: Calling all little firefighters, this fire truck toy is aflame with bright lights, cool sounds and fun firefighting action figures and accessories! Kidplokio’s fire truck toy carrier also features a built in handle so firefighting adventures can be taken to go for play dates, appointments or travel - LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Bright lights and fun fire truck sounds are built into this fire truck toy for the ultimate playtime experience, making it more fun and realistic come playtime with friends and family, inspiring imagination and creativity - TACTILE TOYS: Watch your child's imagination light up as they embark on heroic missions to save the day! Sparking curiosity about firefighting, safety and the importance of helping others, little one’s will benefit from creative pretend play sessions while they participate in tactile, screen free playtime - FIRE TRUCK PLAYSET INCLUDES: This fire truck playset comes with fire truck toy carrier and assorted firefighter accessories like firefighters, traffic cones, a mini fire truck and more, all of which easily pack back up into the large fire truck toy carrier for safekeeping and organization - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 15 x 6 x 9 inches; Weight: 2.15lbs; Materials: Plastic; Warning: Choking Hazard, Small Parts; For Ages 3 and Up; Batteries Included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Red Fire Truck Toys Carrier with Action Figures

openai.title_differentiation: Lights And Sounds, Action Figures And Accessories, Carry Handle, Snap-Closed Storage, Ages 3 Plus
